Class MetadataMapping.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<MetadataMapping.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<MetadataMapping.Builder>
com.linecorp.centraldogma.xds.k8s.v1.MetadataMapping.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.protobuf.Message.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLite.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder, MetadataMappingOrBuilder, Cloneable
Enclosing class:
MetadataMapping
public static final class MetadataMapping.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<MetadataMapping.Builder> implements MetadataMappingOrBuilder
A rule that copies a Kubernetes Pod or Node label/annotation value into the
metadata of the generated LbEndpoint.
Protobuf type centraldogma.xds.k8s.v1.MetadataMapping

    • hasSourceKey

      public boolean hasSourceKey()
      Copies the value of this single label/annotation key,
e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/zone".
      string source_key = 3;

    • hasSourceKeyPrefix

      public boolean hasSourceKeyPrefix()
      Copies the value of every label/annotation key that starts with this
prefix, e.g. "topology.kubernetes.io/". The original keys are preserved
as the metadata keys.
      string source_key_prefix = 4;
      Specified by:
      hasSourceKeyPrefix in interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder
      Returns:
      Whether the sourceKeyPrefix field is set.

    • getSourceKeyPrefix

      public String getSourceKeyPrefix()
      Copies the value of every label/annotation key that starts with this

as the metadata keys.
      string source_key_prefix = 4;
      Specified by:
      getSourceKeyPrefix in interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder

    • getMetadataNamespace

      public String getMetadataNamespace()
      The Envoy filter_metadata namespace to store the value under. Defaults to
"envoy.lb" when empty.
      string metadata_namespace = 5 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = OPTIONAL];
      Specified by:
      getMetadataNamespace in interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The metadataNamespace.

    • getMetadataKey

      public String getMetadataKey()
      The metadata key to store the value under. Defaults to source_key when
empty. Ignored in source_key_prefix mode where the original keys are kept.
      string metadata_key = 6 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = OPTIONAL];
      Specified by:
      getMetadataKey in interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The metadataKey.

      Specified by:
      getMetadataKeyBytes in interface MetadataMappingOrBuilder
      Returns:

      mergeUnknownFields in interface com.google.protobuf.Message.Builder

      mergeUnknownFields in class com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessageV3.Builder<MetadataMapping.Builder>
